message.content:
@startuml
actor "user" as user
rectangle "Wrapped" as Wrapped
rectangle "wrapped" as wrapped

user -> Wrapped: 1 predict(X)
activate Wrapped
Wrapped --> Wrapped: 2 validate; strip
Wrapped --> Wrapped: 3 predict(Xt)
wrapped --> Wrapped: 4 yt
Wrapped --> Wrapped: 5 add metadata
deactivate Wrapped
Wrapped --> user: 6 y

@enduml
